ddls:
CREATE TABLE "benchmark_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmarking scenario */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the scenario (e.g., array access, synchronization) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scenario */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scenario was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test configuration */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking scenario */,
  "array_size_kb" INTEGER /* Size of the array in KB */,
  "thread_count" INTEGER /* Number of threads used in the test */,
  "access_pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the access pattern used */,
  "run_iterations" INTEGER /* Number of iterations for the actual run */,
  "warmup_iterations" INTEGER /* Number of iterations for warmup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_configurations_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES benchmark_scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_configurations_access_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("access_pattern_id") REFERENCES access_patterns ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access pattern */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the access pattern */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test configuration */,
  "cpu_time_ns" REAL /* CPU time in nanoseconds */,
  "other_metrics" TEXT /* Other relevant performance metrics (e.g., cache hits, page faults) */,
  "memory_usage_mb" INTEGER /* Memory usage in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES test_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test configuration */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Result value for the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the result value (e.g., seconds, milliseconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES test_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threads" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thread */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test configuration */,
  "thread_name" TEXT /* Name of the thread */,
  "thread_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the thread (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threads_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES test_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the test */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the test run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the test run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test run (e.g., completed, failed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES test_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking scenario */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_tags_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES benchmark_scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_run_metrics" (
  "run_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Result value for the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_run_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_run_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id")
)
